title: Resolver module graph, scopes, and resolution tables
body:
Extended the resolver with a **module graph**, local scopes, resolution tables, and path/type resolution hooks so semantic rules could query symbols deterministically across files.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `pekan`
- **Commit:** [`0011c54`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/pekan/commit/0011c54)
- **Subject:** Update resolver with module graph, local scopes, resolution tables, and path/type resolution
- **Completed:** 2026-02-21

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.0 (Pecan prototype)
- **Workstream:** `compiler-analysis`
- **Deliverable:** `v00-analysis-foundation`

## Relation
Staged semantic analysis depends on stable **name and module binding** before type checking. This commit is the first production-shaped resolver in the Pecan lineage. Enabled later name-resolution visitor refactors and foreshadowed file-scoped module work in v0.1 (`file-scoped-modules`).

source.subject: Update resolver with module graph, local scopes, resolution tables, and path/type resolution
